title: Looking for Teacher at BITS Pilani Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at BITS Pilani Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
BITS Pilani Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BITS Pilani Digital Technologies:
BITS Pilani Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BITS Pilani Digital Technologies!
